LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF ANACIETO ROMAN'S MOTION TO AMEND THE JUDGMENT TO ADD NON-PARTY ALTER EGO AS JUDGMENT DEBTORS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT SIGNED THE PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: CURTIS E. A. KARNOW; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance: JEFFREY NIEDER, defendant and opposing party appearing in propria persona; no other appearances.

Defendant Jeffrey Nieder appeared but had not notified plaintiff's counsel of his intent to challenge the tentative ruling. The tentative decision is adopted. Plaintiff ANACIETO ROMAN Motion to Compel Answers to Post Judgment Discovery and for Award of Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED. Defendants Anvil Iron Works, Inc., Jeffrey W. Nieder, and Nida Nieder shall each, separately, within 30 days of notice of entry of this Order: (1) respond to Plaintiff's post judgment interrogatories; and (2) respond to and produce documents requested by Plaintiff's Post-Judgment Demand for Production of Documents and Tangible Things. Plaintiff's request for sanctions against Defendants is GRANTED in the amount of $390.00. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Ernst Halperin; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Ntc Of Motion And Motion To Amend The Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-26-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ANACIETO ROMAN's Motion To Amend The Judgment To Add Non-Party Alter Ego as Judgment Debtors is Granted. No opposition filed. The court signed the proposed order submitted with the moving papers. Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
